title: Treatment patterns and outcomes in patients with multiple myeloma in second relapse in Colombia (freedomm): a multicenter observational study.
abstract: Treatment selection for patients with relapsed Multiple Myeloma (MM) is highly individualized and characterized by diverse treatment patterns. While substantial evidence exists regarding relapsed MM in high-income settings, data on treatment patterns and clinical outcomes at second relapse in Latin American populations remain limited. This study describes the clinical characteristics, treatment patterns, effectiveness, and safety of third-line therapy in patients with MM experiencing a second relapse in routine clinical practice across five Colombian institutions.
trial_name: Daratumumab or active monitoring for high-risk smoldering multiple myeloma
